[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] '''Elsah'sai'Moro''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] who jointly represented [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] with her colleague, [[Vien'sai'Malloc]]. She was an old friend of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[T'ra Saa/Legends|T'ra Saa]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], she learned that Vien was secretly sponsoring a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] base on Devaron, and tried to warn Saa. However, before she could relay the information, she was assassinated by [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]], who had been hired by Vien.
